# Videos

Operations related to videos.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `DELETE` | `/videos/{video_id}` | Delete video. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/videos/{video_id}` | Get video. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/videos/{video_id}` | Update video. | Bearer token required |

## `DELETE /videos/{video_id}`

Delete video.

Delete video.

- Operation ID: `delete-videos-video-id`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
